label: Research tab
description: Defines a tab in the research UI that groups related research projects and controls its title, description, and visibility.

generalTitle.label: General title
generalTitle.description: Section header text shown for this research tab. Source default is an empty string.

generalDescription.label: General description
generalDescription.description: Intro blurb text shown for this research tab. Source default is an empty string.

visibleByDefault.label: Visible by default
visibleByDefault.description: Whether this tab is shown without any additional unlock condition.

minMonolithLevelVisible.label: Min monolith level visible
minMonolithLevelVisible.description: Minimum Anomaly monolith level required for this tab to become visible. -1 means always visible regardless of monolith level.

tutorTag.label: Tutor tag
tutorTag.description: Optional UI highlight tag used to point tutorials at this tab.

basic-tab.label: Basic tab
basic-tab.description: Always-visible top-level research tab, relying on source defaults for visibility and monolith gating.

gated-tab.label: Gated tab
gated-tab.description: Conditionally-visible research tab that becomes visible once a minimum monolith level is reached.
